text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Ah, there's a new scent for 
this deodorant spray?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Melty blossom, huh? It must smell
super sweet and flowery…!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Ah, but girly scents like this don't 
really match my image…

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Maybe just this once… No, wait! 
What should I do?!
